feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: adobe form borders lines not getting extended
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an adobe form where the borders lines are not getting extended as the previous field. 
I have tried multiple ways but nothing is working. 
- Added a dummy field and maintained the layout settings - did not work.
- Merged the text into single field instead of two different fields - did not work.
- Changed the layout settings and added borders - did not work.



Please provide some ideas on how I can resolve this issue. 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Streamlining Customer Business Partner Creation in SAP Using BAPIs
entry.content:
Title: Streamlining Customer Business Partner Creation in SAP Using BAPIs

In SAP ERP systems, creating customer business partners programmatically can greatly enhance efficiency, especially when dealing with large datasets or integrating with external systems. SAP provides a variety of tools and function modules for developers to interact with the system, including the powerful Business Application Programming Interfaces (BAPIs).

In this article, we'll delve into the process of creating customer business partners using BAPI_BPCONSUMER_CREATE and BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_ADD, ensuring transactional integrity with BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT.

Understanding the BAPIs:

BAPI_BPCONSUMER_CREATE: Specifically designed for creating customer business partners, this BAPI streamlines the process by focusing on consumer-related attributes and requirements.

BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_ADD: After creating the customer business partner, this BAPI is employed to assign specific roles to the newly generated partner. Roles could include 'Sold-to Party', 'Ship-to Party', or other relevant roles depending on business requirements.

Step-by-Step Guide:

  1. Prepare Data: Prior to invoking any BAPI, ensure all requisite data for the customer business partner creation process is available. This encompasses consumer details, addresses, contact persons, and any other pertinent information.
  2. Create Customer Business Partner: Utilize BAPI_BPCONSUMER_CREATE to specifically create a customer business partner, focusing on consumer-centric attributes and requirements. This BAPI streamlines the process by catering to customer-specific functionalities.
  3. Assign Business Partner Roles: Employ BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_ADD to assign relevant roles to the newly created customer business partner. This step ensures the partner is properly categorized and integrated within the SAP system, facilitating streamlined business processes.
  4. Commit Changes: To finalize and persist the changes made during the creation process, execute BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT. This function module commits the transaction, ensuring the newly created customer business partner is successfully saved in the system.

 

Example Code:

" Create customer business partner

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_BPCONSUMER_CREATE'

  EXPORTING

    consumerdata    = lt_consumer_data

    ...

  IMPORTING

    return          = lv_return.

" Assign business partner roles

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_ADD'

  EXPORTING

    businesspartner   = lt_business_partner

    rolecategory      = 'C'

    ...

  IMPORTING

    return            = lv_return.

" Commit changes

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'

  IMPORTING

    return = lv_commit.

Steps:

Go to SE37

Execute BAPI - BAPI_BPCONSUMER_CREATE

We need to fill mandatory parameters :

Save the details in Test-Directory

Extend to this, use BAPI - BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_ADD   for  assigning the ‘Partner Role’  like customer, vendor,  agents, Bank Customer,  etc.

Then click on ‘Save’ button for Test-directory .

In Next Step – Kindly combine both the BAPI’s.

Go to Test sequence in ‘se37’

System will pop-up the 2nd  screen.

Enter the respective Function modules to use in this scenario and then execute.

 

After the execution below screen will get populate, then select the respective test-directory for creating  ‘Business Partner’ and hit the execute to the BAPI

 

Afterwards BP will get create.

 

Then click to the ‘back button’ and select the second test data from test directory for posting ‘Business Partner’ into a specific role.

In this Step it is mandatory to add business partner number which is created previously

 

Then click on the ‘Execute’.

 

We will get below screen for BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT.

 

 

Then again click on ‘Execute’ tab.

 

Now Cross Verify whether this BAPI has created record in master Table (KNA1) or Not.

On this basis we can check respective master tables .

Conclusion:

In conclusion, by leveraging BAPI_BPCONSUMER_CREATE and BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_ADD, developers can efficiently create customer business partners within SAP systems programmatically. This streamlined approach enhances operational efficiency and ensures transactional integrity, thereby facilitating seamless business processes.

SAP Women in Tech SAP Young Thinkers SAP Innovation Management SAP Learning Solution SAP Enterprise Learning SAP Community SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment ABAP Development SAP TechEd

entry.title: SAP UI5 Dynamic Input of Token into Smart Table Multiinput SmartFilter
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an issue with the:

sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar.SFBMultiInput

The scenario is following:

In a specific scenario I would like to add a new Token to the Multiinput of Smart Table SmartFIlter Bar. 

Hence I prepared the following code: 

 

 

 

let oFilterBar = this.getView().byId("ZZZ--listReportFilter");
var aFilterItems = oFilterBar.getAllFilterItems();
const _ProductIndex = aFilterItems.findIndex(item => item.mProperties.name === 'Product');
let oEVControl = aFilterItems[_ProductIndex].getControl();
oEVControl.removeAllTokens();
let _newToken = new sap.m.Token({
                    key: VALUE.toString(),
                    text: VALUE.toString()
                });
oEVControl.addToken(_newToken);

 

 

 

This is my understanding how one should be able to clear the filter and add new Tokens there. 

However, the problem is as follows:

1. Tokens are not removed with .removeAllTokens().

2. Adding tokens with .addToken(_newToken) may add it as a value but running the app does not reflect a filter (all records are displayed regardless of the added filter). 

3. There is no documentation for sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar.SFBMultiInput. There is for: 

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar.SmartFilterBar

and for:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.m.MultiInput

I guess that the statement in sap.m.Multiinput is the answer to the problem:

  • Creating tokens in the control does not automatically update the model to which the "tokens" aggregation of the control is bound, no matter if the binding mode is set to "TwoWay". This is left to the application logic (check the corresponding sample).

but there are not details presented there. 

 

Thanks for hints.

entry.title: VALID_FROM error using CSAP_MAT_BOM_CREATE
entry.content:
I can run CSAP_MAT_BOM_CREATE successfully, but after only adding VALID_FROM with any date such as "2024-01-01", it will run with exception.

Please kindly guide how to solve it. Many thanks!

entry.title: Failing to import ABAP Flight Reference Scenario in S/4 HANA 2023 system
entry.content:
I have tried, very unsuccessfully, to import the ABAP Flight Reference Scenario to our on-prem S/4 HANA 2023 system.

I tried twice importing the 2023 branch from SAP-samples/abap-platform-refscen-flight at ABAP-platform-2023 (github.com), using a downloaded zip file as our system is blocked by a firewall from connecting directly to github.com

I have documented my attempt and all the errors extensively here:

Failure to import 2023 Branch · Issue #36 · SAP-samples/abap-platform-refscen-flight (github.com)

Has anyone had a similar experience and perhaps managed to do this successfully?

Unfortunately, there is a disclaimer on the repo that there is no support for the Flight Reference Model.

However, the SAP Help suggests to customers to use this repo and abapGit to import it:

Downloading the ABAP Flight Reference Scenario | SAP Help Portal

(It is furthermore baffling to me how much SAP promotes and endorses abapGit when that is developed completely independently and without any support from SAP!).

entry.title: Not able to read MTA - user provided variables from code
entry.content:
Not able to read MTA - user provided variables from code

the user variable shows up in btp cockpit for the application

I am able to see other variables in process.env when in debug

Also added below in node module.

let envinfo = require('@sap/xsenv').loadEnv()

any pointers on how to achieve this or what is wrong ?

entry.title: Set RAP BO response attributes
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have developed a RAP BO API, the BO is composed of some association db tables. For performance improving purpose, I don't want the response to perform an auto read operation to fetch all the attributes.

My idea is to manually set wanted attributes in the response body. Is it possible?

Regards,
Ming

entry.title: ADT Links in MS Teams etc.
entry.content:
Hi all!

I'm using Eclipse for ABAP (with ADT) and there is this nice feature ADT Links, which can link you directly to the source code.

Unfortunatelly, it is not possible to add this kind of link inside Microsoft Teams chat, or Webex, because it starts with adt:// and not with http://

Is there any workaround for this? (obviosly except putting link in the caht as text and then Copy&Paste it in Eclipse) I tried some URL shorteners, but none seemed to support adt://  Is there maybe some way to wrap the link?

What I want to have is a clickable link in a MS Teams conversation or in Webex chat. Is it possible?

Thank you in advance! 🙂

O.

entry.title: S4/HANA standard PR workflow for PR relase Email notification not recived to 2 level Approval agent
entry.content:
We are using the S4/HANA standard PR workflow for PR release (WS00000038) with 3-level approval. The first person creates and releases the PR. At that time, an email notification is sent to the second approver. However, when the second approval agent releases the PR, the email notification is not received by the third approval agent. I have already checked that email addresses are assigned for all three agents. We send email notifications through the RSWUWFML2 program with the variant below. 

Requisition release Task - TS00007986

Please let me know What Should i further check ?

entry.title: ABAP Native SQL not working
entry.content:
I have a requirement to update an external database via ODBC and found that I can native SQL for this.

I also found that I can try out native sql without connection to an external database. If I just use "EXEC SQL" without making a connection, the commands will run on the default connection - that is the SAP database.

Finally I found simple tutorial examples, but I can make none of the examples work.

If I for example run this below code I  get this error:

DATA: BEGIN OF wa,
        matnr TYPE matnr,
      END OF wa.

DATA: exc_ref    TYPE REF TO cx_sy_native_sql_error,
      error_text TYPE string.

PARAMETERS: p_matnr TYPE matnr.

TRY.
    EXEC SQL.
      open dbcur for
      select matnr
        from mara
       where mandt = :sy-mandt
         and matnr = :p_matnr
    ENDEXEC.

    DO.
      exec sql.
      FETCH NEXT dbcur into wa-matnr
      ENDEXEC.
      IF sy-subrc NE 0.
        EXIT.
      ELSE.
        WRITE: / wa-matnr.

      ENDIF.
    ENDDO.

  CATCH cx_sy_native_sql_error INTO exc_ref.
    error_text = exc_ref->get_text( ).
    MESSAGE error_text TYPE 'I'.
ENDTRY.

entry.title: cancel the moved request
entry.content:
Hello,
My question is, can a request moved to the BIQ system be rolled back? Can the request be withdrawn?

entry.title: Updating LIPS Custom Fields In Outbound Delivery Using BAPI
entry.content:
Hey people,

I have an Issue in which I fail to update delivery item fields when using 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE'

I'll let you consider the following setting:

  • My System is ECC 6.0
  • I have extended standard table LIPS with a new field 'ZZEXT_REF'
  • I am receiving an update to the field mentioned with an incoming IDOC
    • something like [vbeln, posnr, ....., zzext_ref]

The solution I have gathered is this:

  1. Receive Delivery Number, Item Number, ZZEXT_REF from IDOC
  2. Call BAPI 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE' with 
    1. DELIVERY = Delivery Number from IDOC
    2. EXTENSION2 = (
      1. ROW = Delivery Row
      2. FIELD = ZZEXT_REF
      3. VALUE = Value from IDOC
  3. Implement BAdI SMOD_V50B0001~EXIT_SAPLV50I_010 (Similar to what is done here)
    1. Export EXTENSION2 values using static member of a BAdI "
      LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC
      " Class
  4. Implement (as said above) a BAdI Class of "LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC"
    1. Implement SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE, extract the data from the static member and insert it into field ZZEXT_REF of table CT_XLIPS at POSNR = ROW from EXTENSION2
  5. Call Commit After Calling 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE'

The problem is that it all runs well except for the actual change save to table LIPS,
I thought it might be caused due to some efficiency mechanism that detected no changes to standard LIPS fields and therefore figured no changes should be done and dropped the change to db.

Suggestions will be suuuuuper useful.

Thanks,

Ariel.

entry.title: Different behavior when submiting and calling transaction vl10b
entry.content:
Hello i'm calling my program rvv50r10c and passing some values but when i execute it i don't get any result but if i open a new mode and call tx vl10b with same parameters it shows results, look:

after execute : 

now, if i call trnasaction vl10b

after execute it, i get this:

Solution

I needed at leat a date in my parameter, with that is done

entry.title: How to convert dependent table on cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there a way to convert a dependent table in the cloud system? I saw a question related to this topic before, but it seemed unresolved. Has anyone encountered this issue before and knows the solution?

entry.title: What is the difference between Length, Decimal Places, Output Length?
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

Does "Length" or "Output Length" determine the maximum length that a variable type can have?
Does Output Length mean including the value after the comma (decimal)? Or is it length?
What is the maximum value I can give for this domain? Can I show the value 1234567891234.12?
Where should I look for the integer part?

 




 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Is there a possibility to set default Item Category based on Incoterms entered at Sales Order level?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus, 

The requirement: When creating a sales order that includes incoterms, the item category on the item line should default to YXXX. Also please also let me know if we can do something in the sales contract to avoid enhancement.

As per my research I did not find any blog or answers related to my requirement. Can anyone tell me is this possible? 

Regards,

Vardhan K

#SAP SD SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: BAPI to Cancel specific line items from billing document
entry.content: I have a Billing Document having 10 Line items and I want to cancel 2 line items out of it. VF11 provides facility to select specific line items and process it for cancellation. I am looking for a BAPI for above purpose to use in custom program.

entry.title: How to use EXIT in substitution OBBH if form parameter C_EXIT_PARAM_CLASS is used
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating a substitution in OBBH at Call Point 3 i.e. Complete Document. I need to update few fields in BSEG table so I have used exit U102 in the substitution exit form pool like below. 

In this exit, parameter C_EXIT_PARAM_CLASS is used so that complete details from bkpf and bseg can be retrieved and necessary changes can be made. After updating exit form pool, I have run program RGUGBR00 to generate all respective substitution programs.

While creating substitution in OBBH, I have selected Exit option to substitute the value of the required field form bseg table like below. But Exit U102 (as provided in form exit pool) is not available in exit list i.e. F4 and I am not able to choose the same. Kindly help me what wrong I have done or is there anything I have missed.

Regards

Sameer Sharma

entry.title: Create a Custom Copy of T-code VD05:
entry.content:
Hello All, 
I have to create a custom copy of T code VD05 to enhance it based on user requirements.
I have copied SAP standard Program working behind VD05 (SAPMF02D) and created a Z transaction(ZVD05) but my program is not executing.
I have copied via SE38 and copied screens.
Program is successfully activated but not getting executed.
Any help with correct process to copy VD05 ( screen 507 of SAPMF02D) is helpful!
Regards,

Łukasz

entry.title: Placing ACH file to AL11 when payment is ran in F110
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to place the ACH file to AL11 when Automatic payment ran thru F110, I created the Event 21 for the payment medium format and created a Z FM ZFI_PAYMEDIUM_SAMPLE_21 and assigned in the event modules.

But, I'm not getting the complete data in the table when event 21 is triggered. Can you guys suggest me to achieve this?

 

Thank You,

Venu.
